message:
fix: resolve --format json collision between rootCmd persistent flag and list/dep-tree local flags

The hidden persistent --format flag on rootCmd (alias for --json, added in PR#2638)
collides with the local --format flags on bd list and bd dep-tree. Cobra shadows
the persistent flag with the local one, so `bd list --format json` treated "json"
as a Go template producing garbage. Fix by recognizing "json" early in both commands
and routing to the JSON output path. Also fix --format <preset> being overridden by
the --tree default (true) in list — explicit --format now suppresses pretty format.

Fixes: bd-c9ni

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -559,6 +559,13 @@ Examples:
 		direction, _ := cmd.Flags().GetString("direction")
 		statusFilter, _ := cmd.Flags().GetString("status")
 		formatStr, _ := cmd.Flags().GetString("format")
+		// Handle --format json: the local --format flag shadows the hidden
+		// persistent --format on rootCmd, so "json" arrives here instead of
+		// setting jsonOutput via PersistentPreRun. Route it explicitly.
+		if strings.EqualFold(formatStr, "json") {
+			jsonOutput = true
+			formatStr = ""
+		}
 
 		// Handle --direction flag (takes precedence over deprecated --reverse)
 		if direction == "" && reverse {
@@ -608,7 +615,7 @@ Examples:
 			tree = filterTreeByStatus(tree, types.Status(statusFilter))
 		}
 
-		// Handle mermaid format
+		// Handle format presets (json handled earlier, near flag read)
 		if formatStr == "mermaid" {
 			outputMermaidTree(tree, args[0])
 			return
